title: Live Safety Classification Escalation And Immutable Session Audit
rationale: Capability widening is unsafe without live safety classification and durable traceability. This bead classifies tutoring events in-session, escalates when thresholds are crossed, and records an immutable audit trail for review.
focus_hint: Keep the classifier narrow and auditable. Focus on escalation triggers, guardian notification, and append-only audit records tied to the active session envelope.
acceptance_criteria: Runtime classifies tutoring events into routine, review, or escalate bands
Escalation path records why the event was flagged and what guardian action occurred
Audit trail is append-only and session-linked for later verification
Safety audit covers lesson-bound tutoring drift, disclosure boundary violations, and guardian oversight discontinuity
